sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this turn-based artillery game

special_mechanics.name: Walking and Jumping
special_mechanics.description: Worms move around terrain normally by walking and jumping

special_mechanics.name: Bungee
special_mechanics.description: Tool that allows worms to move to otherwise inaccessible areas

special_mechanics.name: Ninja Rope
special_mechanics.description: Tool that allows worms to move to otherwise inaccessible areas

special_mechanics.name: Terrain Deformation
special_mechanics.description: Most weapons cause explosions that deform terrain, creating circular cavities

special_mechanics.name: Fall Damage
special_mechanics.description: Worms can die by falling into water at map base or being thrown off side of map

tier_notes: Tier 2: Qualitative data only. Wikipedia source documents gameplay mechanics but contains no specific physics parameters, velocity values, acceleration rates, or gravity constants. Game is turn-based artillery strategy rather than real-time platformer, so traditional movement physics are not primary design focus. Exact movement and gravity values not documented in available sources.
